reviews.comment:
Buen dia, con mi familia solemos ir a cargar nafta y demás, siempre estamos conformes,ahora quería preguntar si reciben cv o si están tomando empleados, mi hermano vive a 30 kilómetros de ahí,gracias

(Translated by Google)
Good morning, my family and I often go there to fill up with gas and other supplies, and we're always satisfied. I wanted to ask if you accept resumes or if you're hiring. My brother lives 30 kilometers away. Thank you.

reviews.comment:
Solo palabras de agradecimiento a todo el personal de esta estación de servicio, Excelente la atención en el shop!!! Además tiene un sector verde con mesitas muy agradable y cómodo para sentarse a comer. Muy recomendable!!!

(Translated by Google)
I have nothing but words of thanks for all the staff at this service station. The service in the shop is excellent! It also has a lovely green area with tables, perfect for sitting and eating. Highly recommended!
